rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 10, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT NEW ROADS REALTY INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Default is continued to December 4, 2020 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TARA BROWN VS. LISA WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Tara Brown'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment And Appointment Of A Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 10, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF TARA BROWN'S Motion For Interlocutory Judgment And Appointment Of A Referee is continued to December 11, 2020. For parties to provide courtesy copies of opposition and reply. Parties shall provide courtesy copies of their respective filings no later than November 20, 2020 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. Court received courtesy copies of the moving papers. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FUELX INC. VS. FORUS, INC . ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 10, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF FUELX INC.'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to November 16, 2020 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than November 10, 2020 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of opposition and reply. = (501/CFH)
